_comment: ADR-107: invariant manifest for shipped agent definitions. Editing an invariant requires updating this manifest — that friction is the review trigger. Section assertions are content-level (min chars inside the tag), not keyword greps.

requiredSections.why: agent role/mission — compression dropping this strands the agent
autonomy + evidence discipline (ADR-105 labeling rule lands here)
aqe/* namespace conventions — wrong namespace corrupts shared memory
post-task learning contract (ADR-110 null capture depends on it)

exemptions.qe-integration-architect.md: PRE-EXISTING DRIFT (found 2026-06-11, issue #522): legacy pre-v3 format, no XML sections at all; content is platform-integration work — needs maintainer rewrite-or-unship decision
exemptions.qe-queen-coordinator.md: PRE-EXISTING DRIFT (found 2026-06-11, issue #522): coordinator archetype has <identity> but lacks default_to_action/memory_namespace/learning_protocol — needs sections added or a coordinator profile defined here

versionPolicy._comment: Agent frontmatter version (3.0.0/3.1.0) vs package.json (3.10.5) — semantics unclear (schema version vs package version). Warn until maintainer decides; flip to fail after normalization.
